title: Scholarly Retrieval System — cross-disciplinary research library with a twelve-stage analytical-governance plane
public_claim: A local scholarly retrieval and evidence-review system, not merely a searchable library.
distinctive_mechanism: It separates the local corpus plane, retrieval plane, and twelve-stage analytical-governance plane: corpus admission and extraction feed sparse, dense, and semantic indexes; hybrid fusion, metadata filters, domain-aware subcorpora, reranking, and chunk-window expansion shape retrieval; query decomposition, evidence retrieval, seven-stage evidence curation, evidence scoring, analyst drafting, citation validation, claim registration, claim-gap review, follow-up query planning, contradiction review, red-team review, abstention-capable final decision, traceability, release, and source-influence.

component_demo_cases.project_title: Scholarly Retrieval System — cross-disciplinary research library with a twelve-stage analytical-governance plane
component_demo_cases.claim_to_demonstrate: decides what belongs in the scholarly corpus, what is stable but unprocessed, what is committed, and what remains excluded or failed
component_demo_cases.input_fixture: books, PDFs, Calibre records, manifests, root paths, source hashes, and status classes
component_demo_cases.operation_under_test: decides what belongs in the scholarly corpus, what is stable but unprocessed, what is committed, and what remains excluded or failed
component_demo_cases.expected_output: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states
